name: NR plus exercise healthy-longevity trial is recruiting without posted results
summary: Recruiting registry combining NR supplementation and exercise training for healthy longevity, with no posted results.
statement: ClinicalTrials.gov lists NCT06425042 as recruiting with 28 estimated participants and no posted results in the June 8, 2026 API view.
population_or_model: Adults in a healthy-aging and metabolic-disease risk context
quantitative_note: Registry enrollment is 28; result status is not posted.
caveats: Registry status and design do not provide evidence of benefit.
Any future result should be reviewed before changing the outlook.
No-results status is useful watchlist context, not efficacy evidence.
